bindings.quest_action: claim a hidden resource cache to secure loyalty and seize power
bindings.quest_focus: a cache of supplies that belonged to the old regime
bindings.quest_stakes: the settlement suffers under weak, indecisive leadership
bindings.quest_threat: those in power will resist change and punish anyone who challenges them
bindings.quest_reward_hint: a powerful ally when the dust settles

dialogueChunks.intro: Close the door, {player_name}. What I'm about to propose isn't for public ears.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I've been watching the power structure in {location} for months. {quest_stakes}, and I have a plan to change that. There's {quest_focus} hidden {location_hint} that I can use to secure the loyalty of every craftsperson and guard. {target_npc} thinks I'm mad, but they'll come around. I need you to {quest_action} and bring back the {quest_item}.
dialogueChunks.outro: This isn't greed, {player_name}. This is vision. Help me, and you'll have {quest_reward_hint}.

playerResponses.text: Vision or ambition, I'll help you claim it.
I'll get your supplies, but I want a cut of whatever comes next.
Power grabs never end well. Find someone else.

bindings.quest_action: fuel an abandoned forge that produces superior weapons
bindings.quest_focus: a forge that can produce weapons cutting through enemy armor
bindings.quest_stakes: whoever controls those weapons controls the region's trade
bindings.quest_threat: a rival who tried to claim the forge first but lacks the skill
bindings.quest_origin: years of studying the previous smith's lost technique

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I'll be direct. I've never been one for pleasantries and I won't start now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: There's {quest_focus} {location_hint} that nobody's used in years. The previous smith produced weapons that could cut through {enemy_type} armor like parchment. After {quest_origin}, I'm certain I can replicate it. I need {quest_item} from the old mine to {quest_action}. {target_npc} tried to claim it first, but {quest_threat} won't stop me.
dialogueChunks.outro: I don't need a partner. I need a pair of hands willing to get dirty. {quest_stakes}, and I intend to be on top.

playerResponses.text: Sounds like a solid investment. I'll get what you need.
Undercutting the guild is risky. But profitable. I'm in.
Schemes like this tend to blow up in everyone's face. No thanks.

bindings.quest_action: intercept a rival's stockpile before they can move it
bindings.quest_focus: a trade deal that would make the rival the wealthiest in the settlement
bindings.quest_stakes: control of the most profitable trade route in the region
bindings.quest_threat: the rival has a head start and the route is crawling with enemies
bindings.quest_origin: years of listening to every secret whispered over tavern ale

dialogueChunks.intro: Sit down, {player_name}. Have a drink. And listen carefully, because what I'm about to offer won't be offered twice.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I run the only tavern in {location}, which means I hear everything. After {quest_origin}, I know that {target_npc} has been stockpiling {quest_item} {location_hint} for {quest_focus}. The route is crawling with {enemy_type}. If someone were to {quest_action}, the deal becomes mine instead.
dialogueChunks.outro: I'm not asking you to hurt anyone. Just to be faster and smarter. {quest_stakes} is at play here.

playerResponses.text: Faster and smarter I can do. Point me the way.
Stealing someone's trade deal? That's cold. But I'll do it for the right price.
This is theft with extra steps. I'm not interested.
